response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passport
ATTR passport : varchar : PK
ATTR customer_name : varchar
ATTR customer_surname : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR airline_code : varchar : FK
ATTR airplane_model : varchar
ATTR status_code : varchar
ATTR status : varchar
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_hour : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR airport_location : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Seat
PK flight_number, seat_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR seat_number : varchar : PK

ENTITY CrewMember
PK license_number
ATTR license_number : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_description : varchar

ENTITY FlightCrewAssignment
PK flight_number, license_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR license_number : varchar : PK : FK

ENTITY DepartureAirport
PK flight_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR airport_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY ArrivalAirport
PK flight_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR airport_code : varchar : FK

REL Passenger -> Flight : 1 -> 0..N : FK=passport
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> AirplaneModel : 1 -> 1 : FK=airplane_model
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status_code
REL Flight -> Seat : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_number
REL Flight -> FlightCrewAssignment : 1 -> 0..N : FK=flight_number
REL Flight -> DepartureAirport : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_number
REL Flight -> ArrivalAirport : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_number
REL FlightCrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1 -> 1 : FK=license_number
REL DepartureAirport -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=airport_code
REL ArrivalAirport -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=airport_code
